title: Good Morning Keralam
desc: The host interacts with various eminent personalities, who shed light on their personal life and professional achievements.

title: Comedy Masters
desc: Talented comedians perform humorous acts and satirical sketches to entertain a special guest and make them burst with laughter.

title: Pudhu Pettai
desc: A young boy runs away when his mother dies and ends up in the company of a gangster. He soon becomes the right-hand man of his employer and makes dangerous enemies.

title: Vakku Maruvakku
desc: The host interviews prominent politicians from different political parties in Kerala about their ideologies and the current situation in the country.

title: Ammayodoppam
desc: Mata Amrtanandamayi, a religious leader, delivers discourses and inspires devotees to follow a spiritually balanced and righteous life.

title: Ucha Vartha
desc: The host talks about some of the latest news stories about political, economic, social and cultural topics from all around the region.

title: Nalla Nilavulla Rathri
desc: Six friends on a business and pleasure trip to Shimoga see their night turn into a terrifying ordeal as unexpected violence and danger force them to fight for survival.

title: Narayaneente Moonnaanmakkal
desc: Three estranged brothers reunite after many years at their childhood home to be with their terminally ill mother, but the friction of time apart causes tense sparks.

title: Sandhya Deepam
desc: Religious leaders and scholars deliver a discourse on various aspects of Kerala's rich cultural heritage and spiritual observances.

title: Kabooliwala
desc: Two litter pickers return from prison to a lost love. However, their past theft of a bugle resurfaces, leading them into a dangerous conflict.
